name: kmb-video-chat
description: No-sign-up group video calling — root dev orchestrator (LiveKit + backend + frontend)

scripts.dev:backend: wait-on -t 180000 tcp:127.0.0.1:7880 && cd backend && npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: wait-on -t 180000 tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && cd frontend && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
